title: crotalaria schumacheri
intro: Crotalaria schumacheri, also known as Schumacher's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria schumacheri include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, as well as its use in treating various health conditions such as fever and rheumatism. Crotalaria schumacheri can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal benefits, with the plant's leaves and stems being the primary sources for herbal preparations.
